cohort_audit.case_definition: concordant strict pair, or strict single-view identity with no counterpart; discordant and non-strict matched identities excluded

method_definitions.augmented_hierarchy_paired_tuned: View experts trained on every available strict case; pair weight and threshold tuned on paired inner OOF.
method_definitions.augmented_hierarchy_union_tuned: View experts trained on every available strict case; pair weight and threshold tuned on union inner OOF.
method_definitions.missing_view_logreg_paired_tuned: AP/lateral three-class experts trained on all available cases; pair blend tuned on paired inner OOF.
method_definitions.missing_view_logreg_union_tuned: AP/lateral three-class experts trained on all available cases; pair blend tuned on union inner OOF.
method_definitions.paired_concat_hierarchy: Paired-only concatenated AP+lateral PCA gate with paired-only AP M2/M3 expert.
method_definitions.paired_concat_logreg: Paired-only direct AP+lateral three-class logistic regression.
method_definitions.paired_viewwise_hierarchy: Paired-only AP and lateral PCA gates blended late; paired-only AP M2/M3 expert.

protocol.ap_only_inference: AP PCA gate and AP M2/M3 expert
protocol.endpoint: strict M2/M3/PCA across concordant paired and genuinely unpaired run identities
protocol.inner_tuning: grouped cross-fitted predictions inside each outer training fold
protocol.lateral_only_inference: lateral PCA gate and lateral M2/M3 expert
protocol.outer_group: Study_Key over the complete union before availability subsets are formed
protocol.paired_inference: blend AP/lateral PCA gates; use AP M2/M3 expert
protocol.selection_metric: inner macro-F1; ties use M3 F1 then neutral weight/threshold
protocol.selection_note: Repeated grouped CV is exploratory and split seeds are correlated; promotion requires a locked patient test.

public_export.note: The full raw result remains local because the GitHub repository is public.
